title: User Registration with Valid Data
description: Verify that a user can successfully register with valid email, username, password, CAPTCHA, and accepted terms.

steps.description: Navigate to the registration tab on the login screen
Fill in a valid email address
Fill in a valid username
Fill in a valid password meeting password rules
Accept terms and privacy policy checkbox
Complete CAPTCHA verification
Click register button
Verify that registration is successful and a confirmation email message is shown

title: User Login with Correct Credentials
description: Ensure user can login successfully with a valid registered email and password.

steps.description: Navigate to login tab on login screen
Fill in registered email address
Fill in correct password
Click login button
Verify user is authenticated and redirected to the Instructions screen

title: Login Failure with Incorrect Password
description: Verify the login fails when user inputs an incorrect password.

steps.description: Navigate to login tab on login screen
Input registered email address
Input incorrect password
Click login button
Verify login fails and appropriate error message is displayed

title: Password Recovery Request
description: Verify that user can request password recovery with valid registered email.

steps.description: Navigate to forgot password screen from login page
Enter valid registered email
Submit password recovery request
Verify that recovery email request confirmation is shown

title: Password Reset with Valid Token
description: Ensure that user can reset password successfully when a valid token is provided.

steps.description: Navigate to reset password screen with valid token
Enter and confirm new valid password
Submit new password
Verify password reset is successful and user can login with new password

title: Team Configuration in Classic 1v1 Mode
description: Verify successful team setup for Classic 1v1 game with valid team and player names.

steps.description: Login and navigate to Team Configuration screen
Enter unique names for Team 1 and Team 2
Add one player to each team with unique player names
Select Classic 1v1 game mode
Select game duration option
Click start game button
Verify game session is created and game screen opens with correct setup

title: Team Configuration Validation for Duplicate Player Names
description: Ensure team configuration screen prevents duplicate player names within and across teams.

steps.description: Navigate to team configuration screen
Enter same player name in Team 1 and Team 2 rosters
Verify an error or warning is shown and start game button is disabled
Enter duplicate player names within the same team roster
Verify an error or warning is shown preventing duplicates

title: Team Configuration Multiplayer 4v4 Minimum Player Enforcement
description: Verify that multiplayer mode requires at least 4 players per team and does not allow starting game without meeting this requirement.

steps.description: Select Multiplayer 4v4 mode on Team Configuration screen
Add fewer than 4 players to one or both teams
Verify start game button is disabled or shows error
Add required minimum players to both teams
Verify start game button is enabled and game can start

title: Gameplay Question Category Selection and Timer Countdown
description: Verify that player can select a category, question is displayed with a 30-second countdown timer, and countdown behaves correctly.

steps.description: Start a game and reach category selection screen
Select a category from the category grid
Verify question and biblical reference are displayed
Verify the 30-second countdown timer starts and counts down every second

title: Gameplay Answer Selection with Correct Feedback and Scoring
description: Verify that selecting an answer shows correct/incorrect feedback, updates score, and displays streak bonus and confetti animations on correct answers.

steps.description: On game question screen, select a correct answer choice
Verify correct feedback is shown
Verify confetti animation is shown for correct answer
Verify scores and streak bonuses are updated correctly
Select an incorrect answer on another question
Verify incorrect feedback is shown and no confetti
Verify score does not increase

title: Gameplay Exit during Game with Auto-save
description: Verify that exiting the game mid-session autosaves the current state allowing future resume.

steps.description: Start a game and answer at least one question
Exit the game using the game menu exit option
Verify current game session is autosaved
Login again and navigate to My Games screen
Verify that the in-progress game is available to resume

title: Multiplayer Remote Buzzer Join with Valid Session
description: Verify remote players can join a multiplayer session using QR code or session ID, set player name and avatar, and join successfully.

steps.description: Open Join screen
Scan valid QR code or manually enter valid session ID
Enter player name and select an avatar
Click join button
Verify player joins session successfully and Controller screen is displayed

title: Multiplayer Remote Buzzer Real-time Synchronization
description: Ensure that buzzer presses, answer selections, and score updates synchronize in real-time across connected remote devices with minimal latency.

steps.description: Connect multiple remote devices to same multiplayer session
Press buzzer button on one remote device when question appears
Verify all connected remote devices display buzzer press in real-time
Select an answer on one controller device
Verify answer feedback and score updates update in real-time on all devices

title: User Profile Update: Change Language Preference
description: Verify that user can change language preference and UI updates accordingly across sessions.

steps.description: Login and navigate to Profile screen
Select a different language from options (Spanish, English, Portuguese)
Verify UI content changes to selected language instantly
Logout and login again
Verify selected language preference persists

title: User Profile XP and Rank Display
description: Verify that XP, current rank, and progress to next rank are accurately displayed on the profile screen.

steps.description: Login and navigate to Profile screen
Verify current XP value is displayed correctly
Verify current rank and progress bar to next rank are visible and accurate

title: Game History Navigation and Resume Past Game
description: Verify user can navigate to game history, view completed and in-progress games, and resume in-progress games successfully.

steps.description: Login and navigate to My Games screen
Verify completed games are listed with results
Verify in-progress games appear with option to resume
Select an in-progress game and click resume
Verify game resumes from saved state

title: Admin Panel Access Control
description: Verify that only authenticated admin users can access the Admin panel.

steps.description: Attempt to navigate to /admin route as non-authenticated user
Verify access is denied and redirect to login
Login as non-admin authenticated user and navigate to /admin
Verify access is denied
Login as admin and navigate to /admin
Verify Admin panel loads successfully

title: Admin Panel CRUD Operations on Questions
description: Verify that admin can create, read, update, and delete questions with multilingual content.

steps.description: Login as admin and open Admin panel
Add a new question with text in all supported languages
Verify new question appears in questions list
Edit the newly added question changing any language text
Verify edits are saved and displayed correctly
Delete the question
Verify question is removed from the list

title: Admin Panel Category Management
description: Verify admin can create and edit categories with multilingual support.

steps.description: Login as admin and navigate to Admin panel category management
Create a new category providing names in Spanish, English, and Portuguese
Verify new category is listed correctly with multilingual data
Edit an existing category and update name fields
Verify changes are saved and visible

title: Admin Panel Import and Export Questions via Excel
description: Verify that admin can import and export question data with Excel files correctly.

steps.description: Login as admin and open Admin panel
Export current questions to Excel
Verify Excel file is downloaded containing correct question data
Modify Excel file adding new questions
Import modified Excel file back into Admin panel
Verify new questions are added to the system

title: Internationalization UI Text and Content Display
description: Verify that UI elements, questions, instructions, and legal pages display correctly in all supported languages according to user preference or auto-detection.

steps.description: Change app language preference to Spanish
Verify UI elements translate correctly and game questions appear in Spanish
Change app language preference to Portuguese
Verify UI elements translate correctly and questions appear in Portuguese
Navigate to Privacy Policy and Terms pages in each language
Verify legal pages show content matching selected language

title: PWA Service Worker Registration and Offline Behavior
description: Verify the PWA service worker is registered and offline capabilities function for cached content.

steps.description: Load the app and check for service worker registration
Verify service worker is registered successfully
Turn off internet connection
Navigate in the app to cached screens
Verify cached pages load without errors while offline

title: Legal Pages Accessibility and Content Validation
description: Verify that Privacy Policy, Terms of Use, and Cookies policy pages are accessible from the app and contain updated content per GDPR and COPPA.

steps.description: Navigate to About Us screen
Access Privacy Policy, Terms of Use, and Cookies policy links from footer or navigation
Verify each legal page loads correctly and displays current content compliant with GDPR and COPPA

title: Game Over Screen Display and Winner Announcement
description: Verify that when a game finishes, the Game Over screen displays final results and announces the winner correctly.

steps.description: Complete a game session to its end
Verify final scores are displayed accurately for all teams
Verify the winner team or player is clearly indicated
